text:
Once upon a rainy afternoon in snowy little townsfolk town.

There lived a girl named Willow. Willow loved books. Especially books about cats.

One chilly evening, under the flickering light of many candles.

Willow found an old tome. It smelled musty.

Inside.

There were poems. Old poems. They spoke of birds flying.

One spoke of a cat.

Willow felt it breathe.

She read it sleep.

That night.

Willow dreamed.

A cat.

A gray one.

Played politics. That's all.

Such tales.

With friends.




Lots friends.

Or none.

Just silly politics.

The gray cat just strode.

Willowed knew.

Something would.

They went nuts.

But magic.

Just magic.

Perhaps silly.

Yet now they soar.



They danced.

So much joy.

Maybe birds.

Maybe cats.

Maybe friends.

Tomorrow dream of stars.

Dream.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
